name: Sylvan Madness
effects: Disadvantage on INT rolls / Spellcast rolls become LDRs

name: Wasting Pox
effects: Double Stamina cost for battles / abilities / etc.

name: Wormsbite
effects: Status effect resistance rolls made with disadvantage

name: Tick Blindness
effects: ACC rolls, ATK rolls and Perception/Search checks made with disadvantage

name: Carapace Rot
effects: EVA -1 / Reaction checks and Initiative rolls made with disadvantage

name: Blackblood Sickness
effects: Gain poison status at start of every battle for 1D4 rounds / Take 1D4 DMG upon rest

name: Gut Poisoning
effects: VIT check (15+) when using consumable potion/medicine/food. If failed the item is lost with no benefit.
